name: bradpaws-embed-proto
description: Sandboxed prototype: multitenant embeddable booking widget (iframe embed for Wix/Squarespace)

scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently -n widget,worker -c magenta,cyan "vite build --watch" "wrangler dev"
scripts.seed:local: wrangler d1 execute embed-proto-db --local --file=./sql/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute embed-proto-db --local --file=./sql/seed.sql
scripts.seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute embed-proto-db --remote --file=./sql/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute embed-proto-db --remote --file=./sql/seed.sql
